name: chartlibrary-mcp
summary: Cohort intelligence engine for stock chart patterns. Anchor any (symbol, date, timeframe) and your AI agent gets the cohort of 300 historical analogs, the full forward-return distribution, and the features that separated winners from losers. 20 MCP tools spanning cohort retrieval, memory, realtime news, and analysis. 25M+ patterns, 19K+ symbols, 10 years.
